input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.9
            TITLE: all connections to external devices such as laptops from a tractive system component must

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.9: All connections to external devices such as laptops from a Tractive System component must
EV.6.5.9 All connections to external devices such as laptops from a Tractive System component must 
include galvanic isolation.

final_answer: All connections to external devices such as laptops from a Tractive System component must include galvanic isolation.
